meaning: n.拉迪克地毯(土耳其村镇Ladik等地织造的一种地毯)
examples: Apple does not exactly put a lot of thought into these meetings as Ladik pointed out.
Ladik, an associate professor of Marketing at Seton Hall University, is what ultimately doomed Forstall.
